subject: Other
purpose: Talk title that captures critique + vision for presentation
key_points: Working theme: 'The New Personal Computer' or nostalgia-forward framing
Example direction: 'Why consumer AI isn't delivering on its promise, and what comes next'
Concise one-liner format

subject: Other
purpose: Talk title emphasizing non-technical accessible complexity
key_points: Working theme: Workflows/agenticity demonstration
Example direction: 'Building impossible workflows without being an engineer'
Position as accessible to non-technical audience

subject: Careerspan
purpose: Market analysis slide content positioning Zo within consumer AI landscape
key_points: Categories of AI tools (chatbots, browser automation, vibe coding, etc.)
What each gives AI access to (browser, files, etc.)
Where each falls short for real work
Zo's unique position: gives AI the server
Format: Simple diagram or framework, not dense text

subject: Careerspan
purpose: Product description slide explaining why virtual computer matters
key_points: Current draft: 'AWS for normal people'
Why virtual computer matters (properties/benefits)
What 'server' enables that other approaches don't
How this relates to 'new kind of computer'
Tone: Accessible but not condescending, aspirational

subject: Other
purpose: Demo introduction explaining Arsenal productivity tracker
key_points: What you're about to see
Why it's impossible elsewhere
What problem it solves
Quick description of what/why

subject: Other
purpose: Demo introduction for primary workflow demonstration
key_points: Setup context without lengthy explanation

Why it's impossible elsewhere

key_points: Draft direction: Not just website building, full computing environment with file/data integration

subject: Careerspan
key_points: Draft direction: Not just context window, but living system with memory and continuous operation

subject: Careerspan

subject: Careerspan
purpose: Elevator pitch that captures unique value
key_points: Must avoid: Too technical, too vague, too ambitious

subject: Careerspan
purpose: More specific pain points and use cases beyond 'aspirational builders'
key_points: Current: 'Aspirational builders willing to invest effort'
Example profiles: Startup founders managing relationships, creators building personal systems, knowledge workers overwhelmed by information
Refinement needed for clarity

subject: Careerspan
audience_context: AI Circle presentation addressing integration concerns
key_points: Key point: Works with existing tools, doesn't replace everything
Example: 'Your Zapier workflows stay, but now you have natural language alternative'

subject: Careerspan
purpose: Description of what's possible to create on Zo
key_points: Scope: From simple workflows to personal apps to self-hosted services
Emphasis: Start simple, grow in complexity as needed

subject: Careerspan
purpose: Simple explanation without jargon for non-technical audience
key_points: Context: Foundational to product understanding
Analogy needed: Something relatable and accurate
Accessible to non-technical audience

subject: Careerspan
purpose: Explain vs. context window without using those terms
key_points: Context: Core differentiator from other AI tools
Approach: Show don't tell, or find better terminology
Accessible to non-technical audience

subject: Other

subject: Other

audience_context: Prospective users similar to case study subject
purpose: Relatable story of user journey from skepticism to adoption
key_points: Format: Short narrative
Key elements: Initial concerns, aha moment, current usage, results
Purpose: Relatable story for similar users
